---
title: "Shortcode Autocomplete Example"
format: html
---

## Built-in Shortcodes

Quarto provides many built-in shortcodes. Type `{{< ` and trigger autocomplete to see them all:

### Examples

**Page break:**
{{< pagebreak >}}

**Placeholder image:**
{{< placeholder 400 200 >}}

**Keyboard shortcut:**
Press {{< kbd Ctrl+S >}} to save.

**Lorem ipsum text:**
{{< lipsum 1 >}}

## Custom Shortcodes from Extensions

This project includes a custom `greeting` extension in `_extensions/greeting/`.

**Custom greeting:**
{{< greeting Quarto >}}

## Autocomplete Demo

To try the autocomplete:

1. Type `{{< ` (opening shortcode syntax)
2. Trigger autocomplete (Ctrl+Space or just type)
3. You'll see both built-in shortcodes (`include`, `var`, `meta`, `pagebreak`, etc.) and custom shortcodes from extensions (`greeting`)
